SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class SymbolicLayoutWriter

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.AbstractWriter
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.SymbolicLayoutWriter
public class SymbolicLayoutWriter extends AbstractWriter
Allows to persistent selected properties of ISymbolicLayouts as XML file. Such files can be read via a SymbolicLayoutReader instance.
See Also:
  • SymbolicLayoutReader

    appendAssociation(int level, ISymbolicLayout model, ISymbolicAssociation association, StringBuilder sb)

  • Constructor Details

    • SymbolicLayoutWriter

      public SymbolicLayoutWriter()

  • Method Details

    • write

      public void write(ISymbolicLayout model, String encoding, File file) throws IOException
      Writes the given ISymbolicLayout as XML file.
      Parameters:
      model - The ISymbolicLayout to save.
      encoding - The encoding to use.
      file - The File to save to.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • write

      public void write(ISymbolicLayout model, String encoding, OutputStream out) throws IOException
      Writes the given ISymbolicLayout into the OutputStream.
      Parameters:
      model - The ISymbolicLayout to save.
      encoding - The encoding to use.
      out - The OutputStream to save to. The OutputStream will be closed by this method.
      Throws:
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • toXML

      public String toXML(ISymbolicLayout model, String encoding)
      Converts the given ISymbolicLayout into XML.
      Parameters:
      model - The ISymbolicLayout to convert.
      encoding - The encoding to use.
      Returns:
      The created XML content.

    • appendModel

      protected void appendModel(int level, ISymbolicLayout model, StringBuilder sb)
      Appends the given ISymbolicLayout with its children to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level to use.
      model - The ISymbolicLayout to append.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

    • appendEquivalenceClass

      protected void appendEquivalenceClass(int level, ISymbolicEquivalenceClass ec, StringBuilder sb)
      Appends the given ISymbolicEquivalenceClass with its children to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level to use.
      ec - The ISymbolicEquivalenceClass to append.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

    • appendState

      protected void appendState(int level, ISymbolicLayout model, ISymbolicState state, StringBuilder sb)
      Appends the given ISymbolicState with its children to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level to use.
      model - The ISymbolicLayout which provides all objects.
      state - The ISymbolicState to append.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

    • appendObject

      protected void appendObject(int level, ISymbolicLayout model, ISymbolicObject object, StringBuilder sb)
      Appends the given ISymbolicObject with its children to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level to use.
      model - The ISymbolicLayout which provides all objects.
      object - The ISymbolicObject to append.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

    • appendValue

      protected void appendValue(int level, ISymbolicValue value, StringBuilder sb)
      Appends the given ISymbolicValue with its children to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level to use.
      value - The ISymbolicValue to append.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

    • appendAssociation

      protected void appendAssociation(int level, ISymbolicLayout model, ISymbolicAssociation association, StringBuilder sb)
      Appends the given ISymbolicAssociation with its children to the given StringBuilder.
      Parameters:
      level - The level to use.
      model - The ISymbolicLayout which provides all objects.
      association - The ISymbolicAssociation to append.
      sb - The StringBuilder to append to.

    • computeObjectId

      protected String computeObjectId(ISymbolicLayout model, ISymbolicObject object)
      Computes a unique ID for the given object in the given model.
      Parameters:
      model - The ISymbolicLayout which provides all objects.
      object - The ISymbolicObject to compute its unique ID.
      Returns:
      The unique ID.
